pkgmetadata.longdescription: Bentoo Tools is a CLI toolkit for Bentoo Linux distribution maintainers and developers. Written in Go, it provides overlay management with automatic commit message generation, git operations (add, status, commit, push), and streamlined workflows for ebuild maintenance.

use.flag: Install interactive-shell safety guards (/etc/bash/bashrc.d/30-bentoo-safety.bash) that add a confirmation delay/block to destructive commands (rm -rf, reboot, poweroff, etc.)
Install a Dolphin/KIO service menu (Plasma 6) that asks for a one-time code via kde-apps/kdialog before an irreversible delete

Build the headless-browser ("script") version parser backend used by some autoupdate packages (via playwright-go). Requires the Playwright browsers to be installed at runtime (playwright install chromium)
Build the chromedp backend for the headless "script" version parser, driving an already-installed Chrome/Chromium over the DevTools Protocol (no browser download needed)

Pull in the full set of runtime backends for app-backup/btrbk and app-backup/snapper (snapshot engines) plus app-backup/restic and net-misc/rclone (cloud-ship) used by bentoo snapshot. The binary degrades gracefully and 'bentoo snapshot detect' names any absent backend at runtime
Pull in sys-apps/systemd for bentoo snapshot scheduling via systemd timers
